data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT_LIGHTWEIGHT: {"version":1,"epicId":"b211-5988","generatedAt":"2026-04-07T16:36:05Z","generatedBy":"preplanning","epic":{"title":"Auto-detect sprint resume from epic status","description":"Sprint operators who resume an interrupted sprint must currently remember to add --resume to their /dso:sprint command. Since the ticket system already tracks epic status as in_progress when a sprint has started, this flag is redundant.","successCriteria":["When /dso:sprint <epic-id> is invoked and the epic status is in_progress, sprint automatically enters resume mode without requiring --resume","The --resume flag is removed from sprint argument parser, usage documentation, and all cross-references","Drift detection during auto-resume is scoped to open tasks only","Sprint prints a brief notice when auto-resume is triggered","Dogfooding validation: first real interrupted sprint confirms auto-detect works correctly"]},"stories":[],"storyDashboard":{"totalStories":0,"uiStories":0,"criticalPath":[]}}
